name: Fimnet Communications Limited
notes: "Fimnet Communications Limited, a Kenyan-based ICT and Internet Service Provider, offers fast, reliable internet connectivity to Nairobi customers. Licensed by the Communications Authority as both a Network Facilities Provider and Application Service Provider, Fimnet stands out as a leading digital innovator within its service area. Residents of Nairobi can rely on Fimnet's cutting-edge technology to support their evolving communication and connectivity demands, allowing them to stay seamlessly connected in an ever-evolving world."
